title: Level 319
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 319: "Fading Away"}}
{{Background|file=Jpg stone wall .jpg}}
{{Decay Theme}}
{{Class 5e}}


{{M.E.G Notice|notice=M.E.G is on an active mission to stop wanderers from entering the level, and encourages you to not enter it.|reason=The level is actively destroying itself, so proceed with caution. Because you may be falling into the void the next second.}}

Level 319 is the '''320th''' level of the Backrooms.
=== Description ===

{{Blurimage|caption=A picture of level 319, Photographer status, deceased.|file= Hallway .png}}

'''Level 319''', also known as Faded Away, takes the appearance of a hotel with white walls that features Non-Euclidean geometry. With paintings that feature abstract works that use warm colors, often depicting or relating to red forest with a yellow sky and orange grass. Wooden black doors that are indestructible. Opening these doors, will not lead to a hotel room like other levels. Instead it will lead to 
more hallways. Lined on the hallways are plants that are unidentifiable and appear to not be real. Mostly because the leaves feel like plastic and due to the lack of sun and water so, the plants are most likely fake.  

The Level is known to constantly shift and change. For example, if someone placed an orange cone on a hallway, and they turned the corner and came back, the hallway would be gone completely. Another thing that has also been noted alongside this is that, if you are 
facing north and walk in a perfectly straight line, you'll somehow end up south, despite not going down any curving hallways. It is also affected by the [[Phenomenon 15|Alone]] Phenomena making interactions with another human impossible. 

=== Demolition Phases ===

Like some levels in the Backrooms, it can create different copies of itself for each wanderer. Due to this the level will slowly destroy. However the damage may differ, so MEG has broken this demolition process into 4 different phases. 

==== Phase 1 ====

This phase is pretty much when the wanderer first enters the level, and is what is described in the description, this is known as the 
starting phase, Lights will start to flicker, and doors will start to have scratches and creak. But for the most part Phase 1 is just 
minor damage and happens around the 2nd hour a wanderer is present in the level.  

==== Phase 2 ====

After the 10th hour has passed, the levels wallpaper will slowly become peeled off at the bottom. wanderers hear water flowing as the 
carpet becomes moist and soggy, and lights will also fall, sometimes landing on a wanderer's head and possibly causing some injuries. The doors will have large cracks and sometimes a doorknob may fall off in an attempt to open a door. during this face the temperatures will get a bit warmer, placing your hand on the wall will feel like its melting.  Most painting start to fall as well or have cracks on their frame.  

==== Phase 3 ====

{{Blurimage|caption=A picture of behind the walls, photographer is most likely dead|file=Imagewall.png|align=left}}  



During Phase 3, sections of the wall will become more and more transparent till they fade away completely. Most of the time behind them will be gray stone walls called The Basement. The Basement takes the appearance of gray stone bricks with sometimes pipes along the wall. These are more hazardous than normal walls, as water may rush out or the wall may crumble completely and is much less stable than the normal hotel walls.

When opening a door, sometimes one may be able to find a desk and a window that appears to just show darkness. This darkness is said to be the void but is unconfirmed, on the desk can be a small lantern. This Room however is temporary and once wanderer's heard click or feel shaking, it is recommended to find an exit back to the hotel. Staying despite the warnings will make this room eventually fade into the void. 

Also during this phase, some doors will open to just a wall and wanderers have recorded numerous times of walls fading into the place, Large puddles form on the ground as parts of roof start falling off, plants that are placed in the hallway will start to die and the paintings will eventually fall.   

==== Phase 4 ====

Phase 4 happens around the 2nd day a Wanderer is in the level, and all exits are closed off there is no exits from here. By this time most lights have gone out, and rooms will start slowly disappearing away. Doors will lead to the void, and walls will eventually disappear, eventually and that remain are just carpets in an endless void that you can walk around on, eventually that'll disappear too, and eventually lead wanderers one last hallway, they may cry, they may panic, but no one can save them from their fate... their fate of falling forever, as the last carpet will eventually will become more and more transparent, or fading away. 

Some camera footage shows after the wanderer starts following the building will reconstruct itself, thus restarting the cycle for the next wanderer that's unfortunate enough to experience '''level 319.''' 

=== Entities and Outposts ===

Due to the state of the level no entities have been found. Due to the nature of the level, no outpost or settlement can be made or established. ￼

=== Theories ===

Theories float around on why this level is constantly changing and destroying itself MEG has looked at 2 of these theories and say those theories may make the most sense. One theory suggests that the level is being changed by an entity that wants to trap wanderers in the void. Another theory states that due to the levels constant shifting and warping layout it is possible that it accidentally destroys itself due to these reasons. However, both of these remain unconfirmed and will likely never be confirmed. 

=== Entrances and Exits ===

==== Entrances ==== 

Parts of [[Level 5]] may transition to this level.

Finding a door that has the number '''319''' on it will lead to this level. 

FInding a destroyed hotel room in the middle floors of [[Level 11.3]] will lead one here. 
 
In any city level, finding a door that says, "BUILDING UNDER DEMOLITON" and entering may lead here. 
==== Exits ====

Following the sound of buzzing lights has a slight chance of going to [[level 0]].

No clipping in the Stone walls may lead to [[Level 2]].

Falling down into darkness may lead to [[The Void]].

No clipping while the room is fading, has a slim chance of sending you to [[Level 66]]. But it is reported that is very diffcult
